package: OMEIA Farkkila Lab Research Knowledge Base Seed Sources
notes: Seed URLs are public starting points, not a full corpus.
Crawler must respect robots.txt, access rights, copyright, and rate limits.
Internal lab files must be indexed separately behind authenticated routes.

lab_public_sources.why: Lab identity, public mission, major research direction.
Core research programs: spatial biology, multi-omics, functional models, precision oncology.
Publication discovery seed and lab-authored paper list.
Recent lab announcements and research context.
Public lab code repositories and computational methods.
